narrative:
Trimble Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,079 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.8 percentage points.
